mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS product_id, uo.buyer_id AS user_id, p.title, p.brief, pi.url AS main_image, s.price, p.sales, m.id AS merchant_id, m.name AS shop_name, pc.name AS category_name, CASE WHEN pt.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_traceability FROM user_order uo JOIN order_detail od ON uo.id = od.order_id JOIN product p ON od.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT product_id, url FROM product_image WHERE image_type = 0) pi ON p.id = pi.product_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT product_id, MIN(price) AS price FROM sku GROUP BY product_id) s ON p.id = s.product_id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON p.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN product_category pc ON p.category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN product_traceability pt ON p.id = pt.product_id
SELECT DISTINCT od.product_id FROM user_order uo JOIN order_detail od ON uo.id = od.order_id WHERE uo.buyer_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.title, p.brief, pi.url AS main_image, s.price, p.sales, m.id AS merchant_id, m.name AS shop_name, pc.name AS category_name, CASE WHEN pt.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_traceability FROM product p LEFT JOIN (SELECT product_id, url FROM product_image WHERE image_type = 0) pi ON p.id = pi.product_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT product_id, MIN(price) AS price FROM sku GROUP BY product_id) s ON p.id = s.product_id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON p.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN product_category pc ON p.category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN product_traceability pt ON p.id = pt.product_id ORDER BY p.sales DESC LIMIT #{limit}
